title: The Stubborn Scholar
description: Someone tried to debunk a theory — and failed. Does a failed debunk tell you anything?

hints.text: A failed debunk means the card reader confirmed the theory — but you still see the true sign. Failure is not silence: you learn G+ is the true sign for ingredient 1.
Ingredient 1 has R+ (from the sheet) and G+ (from the failed debunk). Which alchemicals have both R+ and G+?
R+ and G+ narrows ingredient 1 to Ppn or PPP. Both mix with pNn (ingredient 2) to give R+, so the answer is R+ regardless of which one it is.
